statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1242 — D-FUMT₈ Maximal Recapture Region — Axiom-Free Characterization
              in Lean 4

  Follow-up to STEP 1240, which proved that modus ponens recaptures on the
  classical Boolean subset `{TRUE, FALSE}` of D-FUMT₈ and fails on the
  Belnap-Dunn FOUR subset `{TRUE, FALSE, BOTH, NEITHER}`. STEP 1240 left
  open: *what is the maximal MP-stable subset?*

  This file closes that question with a full characterisation:

      mpValid s  ↔  (s BOTH = false) ∨ (s FALSE = false ∧ s NEITHER = false)

  In words: MP fails on a subset iff the subset contains BOTH together
  with

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
